findings.title: --dangerously-skip-permissions on every agent invocation
findings.description: Every claude/opencode invocation across all commands appends --dangerously-skip-permissions unconditionally. No per-command opt-out. Combined with prompt injection enables full shell access.
findings.recommendation: Remove from non-destructive commands. Use --allowedTools for review.

findings.title: vote tally silently accepts all-INVALID results as valid
findings.description: No quorum check after tallying. If all agents fail, tally={yes:0,no:0,abstain:0,invalid:3} but exit code is 0 and output looks valid.
findings.recommendation: Exit non-zero if tally.invalid === parsed.length. Add error field in JSON mode.

findings.title: git diff injected into LLM prompt — injection + maxBuffer overflow
findings.description: spawnSync git diff with no maxBuffer (1MB default). Diff content interpolated verbatim into agent prompt. Malicious diff content passes to agents with --dangerously-skip-permissions.
findings.recommendation: Cap diff at 100KB. Wrap in <diff> delimiter. Add maxBuffer option. Move to async execFile.

findings.title: readdirSync/cpSync throw unhandled ENOENT if source dirs absent
findings.description: No try/catch around readdirSync(srcCmds) or cpSync(dist/companion.mjs). Partial install on failure leaves inconsistent state with no rollback.
findings.recommendation: Wrap in try/catch. Rollback with rmSync on failure. Pre-check dist/companion.mjs.

findings.title: checkCli spawnSync blocks event loop — no timeout
findings.description: spawnSync with no timeout option. Called N times synchronously per command invocation. Hangs entire process if binary is slow.

findings.title: runAgent Promise never resolves if agent hangs
findings.description: spawn with no timeout. Promise.all hangs indefinitely. stdout/stderr buffers unbounded.
findings.recommendation: Add setTimeout kill + resolve({error:'timeout'}) after configurable deadline.

findings.title: requireAvailable calls process.exit(1) inside exported library
findings.description: Library export calls process.exit unconditionally. Any importer gets hard-killed. Untestable without subprocess isolation.
findings.recommendation: Throw Error instead. Let CLI entry point own exit decision.

findings.title: parseClaudeStreamJson silently swallows JSON parse errors
findings.description: try/catch discards all JSON parse errors. Caller receives empty string with code 0 — indistinguishable from valid empty response.
findings.recommendation: Log errors to stderr. Track malformed-line rate.

findings.title: install.mjs PLUGIN_VERSION hardcoded, no version guard
findings.description: Every install overwrites same path regardless of version. No rollback on failure.
findings.recommendation: Read existing version before overwriting. Wrap cpSync in try/catch.

findings.title: curl-pipe installer + unverified npm name — supply chain risk
findings.description: README documents curl|bash with no checksum. npm package name unverified. Unconfirmed pending external check.
findings.recommendation: Publish SHA-256 checksums. Claim npm name. Use pinned npx.

hypotheses.hypothesis: --dangerously-skip-permissions enables full shell access via prompt injection
vote exits 0 with semantically invalid tally when all agents return INVALID
git diff maxBuffer overflow crashes review on large repos; diff content is LLM injection vector
installOpenCode throws unhandled ENOENT and leaves partial install state
checkCli spawnSync blocks event loop indefinitely on slow binary
runAgent hangs forever if agent process never closes
requireAvailable kills host process unconditionally — library contract violation
Malformed stream-json lines silently dropped — partial output returned as success
